svg.title: issue-triager dark
svg.desc: Issue triage view in dark mode with the newest issue context first and a workspace action in the detail pane.

button.title: Add assignees

span.style: background-color: rgb(215, 58, 74); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-color: rgb(215, 58, 74);

button.class: action-button action-button--neutral action-button--soft action-button--sm btn--labels svelte-tjnjht

div.p: Safari users report the widget panel going blank after resizing the page.
Observed on Safari 17.4 with the default widget theme. Chrome and Firefox keep rendering the panel.

ul.li: Reproduces after opening the dashboard, resizing below 900px, then returning to desktop width
Suspect CSS containment around the widget frame
Needs a reduced test case before assigning implementation

button.class: action-button action-button--info action-button--soft action-button--sm btn--workspace svelte-tjnjht
button.title: Create an issue worktree, then open Workspaces to launch agents or shells on that branch.

div.span: Create an issue worktree, then open Workspaces to launch agents or shells on that branch.

button.class: action-button action-button--danger action-button--outline action-button--sm btn--close svelte-tjnjht

div.p: I can reproduce on 17.4. I will reduce it to the containment rule before assigning the fix.
Confirmed on Safari 17. Looks like the widget frame loses its computed height after the resize.
